title: Processing a Viral Metagenome Using iVirus
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1sp97","text":"A collection of protocols designed to guide the user in processing a viral metagenome from raw sequence data to assembly, and subsequent analysis. The user uses actual reads from Ocean Sampling Day (2014) and processes them entirely within Cyverse, a NSF-supported cyberinfrastructure.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":161,"length":6}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":179,"length":25}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"0AEE4F81B71349B1A9CDCF778280F6D4","url":"https://github.com/MicroB3-IS/osd-analysis"}}}}
creator: Benjamin Bolduc
